ordering.algorithm: For each UTF-8 case ID compute SHA-256(salt + U+001F + case_id); sort ascending by lowercase hexadecimal digest, breaking an impossible digest tie by case ID.
ordering.pseudonym_algorithm: Assign CASE-EVAL-0001 upward after deterministic sorting. The mapping remains sealed from primary adjudicators until both initial ledgers are locked.

adjudication.lock_method: Serialize each initial ledger as UTF-8 JSON with no duplicate keys, preserve its raw bytes, compute SHA-256, and record the digest before comparison.
adjudication.reconciliation_limit: One documented reconciliation pass; unresolved cells proceed to the tie adjudicator without rewriting initial ledgers.

execution_intake.creation_boundary: Create only after a valid freeze and before any case packet, planned output, or result access.
required_fields: study_id, study_record_id, record_version, and exact frozen manifest raw-byte digest
two primary adjudicator stable contributor IDs and one tie adjudicator stable contributor ID
role-specific eligibility, isolation, and conflict declarations
confirmation that no adjudicator is a protocol, profile, rule, or case author or the freeze authority
UTC intake timestamp and execution authority
raw-byte SHA-256 over the immutable intake
execution_intake.provenance_rule: Every later finding or terminal disposition cites the execution-intake artifact ID, version, digest, and applicable contributor IDs.

agreement_metrics.raw_exact_agreement: matching initial codes divided by all jointly valid coded cells
agreement_metrics.cohens_kappa: (observed agreement - expected agreement) / (1 - expected agreement), using marginal frequencies across the five codes; report NOT_ESTIMABLE when expected agreement equals 1
agreement_metrics.threshold_rule: If either estimable threshold fails for an analysis, its candidate assessment is INCONCLUSIVE even if tie adjudication yields a complete final ledger. Preserve both the final ledger and the reliability failure.

missing_value_policy: Never impute. A missing required frozen fact produces AMBIGUOUS when the case remains interpretable or INVALID_CASE when it does not; a missing required ledger cell invalidates the affected analysis.
multiple_comparison_policy: No null-hypothesis significance tests or p-values are planned. Counts and proportions are descriptive and every confirmatory threshold is predeclared per analysis.
result_access_policy: No output file, evaluator code, result summary, or provisional score may exist or be accessed before the freeze attestation. Discovery of one halts freeze and requires an integrity review.
retention: Retain frozen inputs, both initial ledgers, their digests, pseudonym mapping, reconciliation notes, tie decisions, metric calculations, atomic findings or dispositions, and all negative, null, ambiguous, contradictory, invalid, halted, and not-run material. Corrections create superseding records and never overwrite frozen or published bytes.
deletion: Drafts may be superseded through repository history before freeze. Frozen research artifacts are immutable evidence inputs; an accidental sensitive datum triggers quarantine and governance review, with a minimally revealing incident record and no silent deletion or rewrite.
interpretation_boundary: Counts, agreement values, and structural dispositions cannot establish taxonomy truth, completeness, external validity, biological fidelity, implementation suitability, safety, adoption, or mechanism evidence maturity.
